seoTitle: Suntop vs Surf Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Suntop and Surf Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Suntop vs Surf Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Suntop and Surf Beach.
heading: Suntop vs Surf Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Suntop, New South Wales and Surf Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Suntop has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Surf Beach (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Suntop or Surf Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Suntop has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Surf Beach scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Suntop scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Surf Beach scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Suntop or Surf Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Suntop has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
